$schema: Audit record for the duplicate-title-tag fix on the Arlington Heights adjustable-bed article. SEMrush 20260521 flagged 4 pages with duplicate title tags; 2 were the intentional Memorial Day campaign duplicates, 2 were adjustable-bed articles sharing an identical seoTitle metafield. This record covers the seoTitle update on the Arlington Heights article so its <title> tag differs from the umbrella explainer.

changes.valueBefore: Adjustable Beds: Benefits, Features & How to Choose | LA Mattress Store
changes.valueAfter: Adjustable Bed Benefits for Better Sleep Quality | LA Mattress Store
changes.rationale: Differentiates this article's <title> from the parallel /blogs/mattress-buying-guide/adjustable-mattresses-the-ultimate-solution-for-personalized-comfort article which keeps the original 'Benefits, Features & How to Choose' framing as the umbrella explainer. This article's body content emphasizes sleep-quality benefits (matches the new title), so the angle is consistent.

remainingDuplicates: /pages/memorial-day-sale-2026 vs /collections/memorial-day-sale — intentional campaign duplicate, per round-1 QA brief; leaving as-is.
